caption: A man with short brown hair is seen in a small picture-in-picture window in the lower-left corner of a computer screen, appearing to present a financial trading platform. He wears a dark blue shirt and speaks directly to the camera, with his facial expression changing slightly across the frames. The main screen displays a trading interface featuring a price chart for the EURGBP currency pair, marked with red, yellow, and green horizontal zones. The "TICKMILL" logo is prominently visible in the top-left corner. On-screen German text reads, "HANDELN SIE AN DEN FINANZMÄRKTEN MIT SICHERHEIT UND VERTRAUEN," followed by a list of platform features and the website "www.tickmill.com/de/". The chart shows price fluctuations over time with various vertical indicators. As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking while the trading software remains open on the monitor.
